channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Friday, 20th March
item.description:
They just missed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southwark Park Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light snapped off, 20th March
item.description:
As you can see by the photo, the lamp has snapped off and is just hanging on by the electrical wire. This is on the roundabout by Queen Mary’s hospital at the top of the slip road coming off the A20 from Eltham. If it’s snaps, it could easily hit a car or cause a crash.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sidcup By-pass, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Street Light - Equipment damaged, pole leaning

item.title: Broken wheelie bin left in street, 20th March
item.description:
Broken wheelie bin left in street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kenninghall Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocking public walkway, 20th March
item.description:
This bar consistently blocks the pavement with plant pots and their a-board advertisement. The walkway on Rye Lane is wide at the best of time and this forces the public to walk on the road and makes it a problem to push buggies by.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 138, Rye Lane, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Leaves/litter/weeds, 20th March
item.description:
Loads of leaves and untidiness encouraging fly tipping and a build up of litter.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Blackheath Hill, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping next to bin area of Barbrook house, 20th March
item.description:
There’s a deconstructed garden shed spread around, a chest of draws, a plastic bin, a large wooden box and a few foldable chairs in the bin area next to Barbrook house. The fly tip must have happened at some point between 20:00 and 6:20 today. Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Paragon Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal Parking Blocking Access, 20th March
item.description:
Subject Illegal Parking Blocking Access Hello, As you can see in the attached picture, people are using this area for parking, even though parking is not allowed here.Woodsford building Portland Street London The vehicles are blocking the entrance, which makes it impossible to remove the rubbish and access the area properly. Could you please send local officers to address this issue? Thank you for your assistance. Kind regards,

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Portland Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Exposed electrics, 20th March
item.description:
The cover of this street lamp has been opened exposing the electrics

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parsonage Manorway, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Between 2 Donaldson and Brondesbury road, 20th March
item.description:
Take away litter left Also pavements need to be swept given tree debris

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brondesbury Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unrepaired ramp wall., 20th March
item.description:
This ramp wall was supposed to be repaired two weeks ago. The only thing that has happened is that the barriers have been removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Nelson Place, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Still here! Dumped near side door, 20th March
item.description:
Part of the dumped rubbish is still there.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bethune Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car, 20th March
item.description:
This car has been parked on private property for about 3 weeks. Does not belong to any of the neighbours or the venue/church. Can this be removed asap as the parking space belongs to the church and it’s blocking for other car park users o

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsland Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Items dumped on grass making looking unsafe and untidy, 20th March
item.description:
Items dumped on grass
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, Whippendell Way, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bent metal fence bar at Sunray Gardens, near round about at the bottom of Red Post Hill, 20th March
item.description:
There is a metal fence bar that is bent at Sunray Gardens, at the bottom of Red Post Hill near the round about. The gap between the bars is therefore wider at that place and the children can get out of the park through that gap in the fence, which is very unsafe as it leads directly to Red Post Hill, which has lots of traffic. This has been an issue for a long time (probably years). It needs urgent fixing please, as it is not safe for the kids. Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Red Post Hill, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Lime Bike blocking pavement, 20th March
item.description:
Lime Bike left on savoy place pavement near Adelphi carpark.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Savoy Place, Covent Garden, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Poster tied to road sign, 20th March
item.description:
Location: Lulworth Road near junction with Bellegrove Road The is a poster that is secure to a mini pallet that is tied to the Lulworth Road sign post using a black plastic tie. It is fully of the public realm.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bellegrove Road, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Is this tree pit supposed to be planted or not?, 20th March
item.description:
Please could this be inspected? If ok to plant and come back into use it will need to be dug out by Highways and made ready for planting. Currently it is just being parked over....

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmstead Avenue, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bushes and trees overgrown, 20th March
item.description:
Bushes and trees overgrown.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dunkery Road, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Same car reported 6 times still parking illegally, 20th March
item.description:
Same resident at Pynfolds- still parking at a spot that does not exist, still making manoeuvres out of legal spaces difficult, still getting away with it by moving car before 8:30am.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Jamaica Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Temporary traffic lights, 19th March
item.description:
The temporary traffic lights cannot be seen from the stop line causing cars to remain at the lights on green and constant road rage. Please either relocate the lights, introduce secondary lights, or relocate the stop line.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Church Lane, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet
